items.name: vellum
items.title: Vellum — HyperFrames review & annotate
items.description: A transparent review-and-annotate layer for HyperFrames videos. Pin time-coded notes on any frame; your coding agent reads them back. Installs the local server, the player, and the review-packet builder.

items.name: vellum-skill
items.title: Vellum agent skill
items.description: Teaches a coding agent (Claude Code / Cursor) how to drive Vellum: start the server, read notes/annotations.md, render the review packet, and apply each note to the composition.
